title: The Glimmering Palace
lines: Against all reason, the shifting heat reveals a marble palace rising from the dunes. Its domes are made of polished turquoise, and the air around it is impossibly cool.
You see robed figures moving through the gardens, and the faint sound of a flute carries across the sand.
This is no ordinary mirage; it feels more real than the village you left behind.

options.desc: 2. Stand in awe of the turquoise domes
3. Retreat back to the heat of the dunes
